claim: The YOLO demand router schema already implements PRD readiness blocking when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify recommendations, or failed status. The blocking logic in inspectDemandPrdReadiness prevents prd_ready from returning true when evidenceResultBlockingIssues detects missing fields, clarify/block recommendations, failed verdicts, or evidence agent conflicts.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function creates blockers when evidence agents have missing array, clarify/block recommendations, failed verdicts, or failed status.
evidence.why: This is the core blocking logic that prevents PRD readiness when evidence is incomplete or problematic.

evidence.summary: EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker code added when result.missing array has items.
evidence.why: Shows missing evidence directly becomes a blocker to PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED added when recommendation is clarify/block, verdict is blocked/failed, or status is blocked/failed.
evidence.why: Shows clarify recommendations and failed status become blockers.

evidence.summary: Loop over required evidence roles checks each agent result for completeness and calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues.
evidence.why: Shows the integration point where blocking issues are collected into the blockers array.

evidence.summary: Conflicts from inspectEvidenceAgreement are pushed into blockers array.
evidence.why: Shows evidence conflicts also prevent PRD readiness.
Shows the final logic where any blocker prevents PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test case 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' asserts prd_ready is false and blockers include EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED.
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms the blocking behavior works as specified in the demand.

evidence.summary: Test case 'cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result' shows that prd_ready is false when only explorer is present, and true only after all three required agents complete.
evidence.why: Shows the cross_check policy requires all evidence agents before PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Test case 'evidence conflicts and existing blockers prevent PRD readiness' shows conflicts cause EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blocker.
evidence.why: Shows evidence agreement conflicts also block PRD readiness.

risks: If the demand seeks to ADD this blocking behavior, it already exists and the demand is based on outdated understanding.
If the demand seeks to FIX broken blocking behavior, current tests suggest it works correctly.
If the demand seeks different blocking semantics, the current implementation would need modification.
missing: Clarification of whether this demand is requesting new feature implementation, fixing broken behavior, or modifying existing behavior semantics.
User confirmation that current blocking behavior matches their expectation for missing/clarify/failed evidence.
Evidence of current failures in production or real-world usage if this is a bug report.

result.notes: The claim that missing evidence and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness is verified in code and tests. However, the demand objective states this as a requirement rather than an existing fact, suggesting possible misunderstanding of current implementation or desire for different behavior.
